About Contact

Advertisement

Contact Us

Get in Touch

Have a question, suggestion, or feedback? We'd love to hear from you. Use the information below to reach out to us.

Email

contact@financialtools.directory

Submit a Tool

Know of a great financial tool that should be listed in our directory? We're always looking to expand our listings with quality tools that help investors and traders.

Send us an email with the following information:

  • Tool name and website URL
  • Brief description of what it does
  • Category (Stock Screener, Portfolio Tracker, etc.)
  • Pricing information
  • Why you think it should be included

Report an Issue

Found incorrect information about a tool? Is a link broken or a tool no longer available? Please let us know so we can keep our directory accurate and up-to-date.

Business Inquiries

For partnership opportunities, advertising inquiries, or other business matters, please reach out via email with "Business Inquiry" in the subject line.

Response Time

We aim to respond to all inquiries within 2-3 business days. Thank you for your patience.
